component.name: thumbgrid
component.summary: Image viewer. Fast, easy to use. Optional video support.

description.p:
Image viewer. Fast, easy to use. Optional video support.
Key features:
- Simple UI - Fast - Easy to use - Fully configurable, including themes, shortcuts - High quality scaling - Basic image editing: Crop, Rotate and Resize - EXIF/IPTC/XMP metadata via exiv2 (view, preserve on save, strip-all) - Ability to quickly copy / move images to different folders - Folder view with file management (copy/cut/paste, mkdir, rename) - Experimental video playback via libmpv - Ability to run shell scripts
